title: Baton Release Board
description: Machine-readable structure of one release board: tracks, slices, dependency edges, worktree binding, and the vertical trace. Slice runtime state lives in each slice's status.json (slice-status-v1); the board references slices by id and never duplicates their state.

id_token.description: A clean identifier token. Disallows whitespace and ':' so a newline-fusion defect (e.g. a track id that absorbed a following 'slices:' key) fails validation by construction.

target_version.description: Semver the release ships, e.g. v0.1.0.

integration_branch.description: The release integration base branch, e.g. release/v0.1.0.

vertical_trace.description: The golden-thread top: the benefit every slice traces up to, and the optional higher objective it serves. Grouped so the trace can grow without a breaking change.

benefit.description: The user/business benefit this release delivers. The RTM gate threads every slice up to this.

org_objective.description: Optional higher objective the benefit serves. The solo/small-team floor has none; absence is valid.

tracks.description: Touchpoint-disjoint tracks. Order is informational; dependencies are explicit via depends_on.

slices.description: Slice ids in this track, in implementation order. Each slice's own status.json (slice-status-v1) holds its runtime state.

depends_on.description: Track ids that must merge before this track.

worktree.description: The track's git worktree binding. Absent for a track not yet checked out. Grouped so the binding can grow (e.g. head sha, created_at) without a breaking change.

path.description: Absolute path of the track's git worktree.
